name: Lindy's Famous Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1 Cup All Purpose Flour, sifted with 3 Tablespoons Flour
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the crust first: In a medium bowl, combine flour, sugar, lemon peel, and vanilla. Make a well in the center.
2. Add egg yolk and softened butter. Mix with fingertips until a dough forms and cleans the sides of the bowl.
3. Form the dough into a ball. Wrap in wax paper. Refrigerate for 1 hour or more.
4. Preheat oven to 400 degrees F (200 degrees C).
5. Grease a 9-inch springform pan. Remove the side from the pan.
6. Roll 1/3 of the dough on the bottom of the springform pan and trim to fit.
7. Bake until golden, 8-10 minutes. Divide remaining dough into 3 parts.
8. Roll each part into a strip 2 1/2 inches wide and about 10 inches long. Place the springform pan back together with baked crust on bottom.
9. Fit the strips along the side of the pan, joining ends inside to completely line the inside. Trim so dough is only 3/4 up the side.
10. Increase oven temperature to 500 degrees F (260 degrees C).
11. In a large bowl, combine cream cheese, sugar, flour, lemon and orange peels, and vanilla extract. Beat until blended.
12. Add eggs and egg yolks one at a time. Mix in heavy cream. Beat until well combined.
13. Pour into the springform pan. Bake 10 minutes.
14. Reduce oven temperature to 250 degrees F (120 degrees C). Continue baking for 1 hour.
15. Cool on a wire rack. Refrigerate at least 3 hours before serving.
16. Loosen pastry from the side of the pan with a spatula. Remove the side of the springform pan.
17. Cut into wedges and serve.
